title: prostanthera phylicifolia
intro: Prostanthera phylicifolia, also known as the 'Green Oval Balm Mint', is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to eastern Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Prostanthera phylicifolia has been used to aid in digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its numerous health benefits.
